market_context: Market is in a confirmed trending_down regime (Nifty -1.0%, ADX 25.0). Per yesterday's learnings, ALL BUY setups must be rejected as they are counter-trend. Only the SELL/supply zone setup on BPCL aligns with the bearish regime, though it has a moderate zone score of 40. With only 3 setups available and a hard block on BUY orders in this regime, only 1 setup qualifies.
